title: TD0-2
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:TD0-9.jpg|thumb|right|200px|TD0-2 with Rorworr.]]
{{Dialogue|Sia-Lan|When Deel goes for the door, we'll have to cover him!|Rorworr|'''OOORRAWK!'''|TD0-2|He says—''"
:'''Sia-Lan''': "''No need to translate, I caught the tone.|attr=[[Sia-Lan Wezz]] talks strategy with Rorworr, TD0-2 doesn't get to translate.|src=<ref name="Battle">"[[Battle for Theed]]"</ref>}}
'''TD0-2''' was a hovering translator [[Droid/Legends|droid]] belonging to [[Rorworr (Naboo)|Rorworr]]. It was similar in function to the later [[M-TD]]. Its primary function was to translate [[Shyriiwook/Legends|Shyriiwook]] and [[Thykarann/Legends|Thykarann]] to [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]], as Rorworr understood Basic, but was unable to pronounce it.

==Behind the scenes==
Comments in the Production Art Gallery on Wizards labels the droid as "TD0-9." However, the droid is designated TD0-2 in [[Battle for Theed]], a free, 3-page teaser comic released by [[Wizards of the Coast]].<ref name="rebelscum">{{Rebelscum|url=darkhorse_TPM.asp|text=Episode I: The Phantom Menace Comics}}</ref> The droid is also designated TD0-2 on page 004 of the [[Star Wars: Invasion of Theed Adventure Game]] Rulebook.
